title: MHCLG annual report and accounts 2023 to 2024
body: "The annual report and accounts for the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government provides a comprehensive account of the department and its group’s use of resources during the financial year 2023 to 2024 and information about its activities and performance against its objectives.  This report is filed in respect of the accounts up to 31 March 2024 incurred by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG). On 10 July 2024, the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities (DLUHC) was renamed as MHCLG, so this report is filed by MHCLG in respect of the department formerly known as DLUHC.  "
